# EasyAircon

> Aircon supply, installation, repairs, regas and servicing in Durban, South Africa. Free, firm quotes within 24 hours from vetted, SAQCC-certified installers. Trade pricing on Samsung, LG, Alliance, Jet-Air, Midea, Hisense, Daikin, Carrier and Defy. Durban is the primary service area; commercial and multi-unit jobs are quoted in Cape Town, Johannesburg, Pretoria and nationwide.

Key facts:
- Services: aircon supply and installation, installation-only, repairs, regas (refrigerant refill with leak check), servicing and maintenance, commercial and multi-unit air conditioning
- Coverage: greater Durban including Umhlanga, Durban North, Ballito, Westville, Pinetown, Hillcrest, Amanzimtoti and surrounds; nationwide for commercial projects
- Typical pricing (Durban): installation-only R2,500–R4,500 for a standard midwall split; 9,000 BTU supplied and installed from about R8,000; regas R800–R1,500 including leak check
- Sizing guide: 9,000 BTU for a standard bedroom (up to ~15 m²), 12,000 BTU for 20–30 m², 18,000 BTU for 30–42 m², 24,000 BTU for 42–55 m²; size up in Durban's coastal humidity
- Quotes are free with no call-out fee; one bundled price covering unit, certified installation and materials; manufacturer warranty stays valid
- Contact: hello@easyaircon.co.za, WhatsApp +27 82 794 7084

## Main pages

- [Home, quote form and full service details](https://easyaircon.co.za/): services, aircon size calculator, BTU guide table, pricing FAQs, coverage areas
